title: Fix podman-remote version to print client and server
body:
If the user specifies .Server.* on a non podman-remote,
substitute .Client for .Server and return the value.
This is for compatability with Docker.

Since prior versions documented --format {{ .Version }}, we
have to continue to support that.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *chkumar246*, *rhatdan*, *ssbarnea* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Does this actually fix the issue? It only affects remote Podman, and it doesn't look like they're running remote.

@mheon Yes it does.  

```
$ ./bin/podman version --format '{{.Server.Version}}'
1.6.4-dev
$ ./bin/podman version --format '{{.Client.Version}}'
1.6.4-dev
$ ./bin/podman version --format '{{.Version}}'
1.6.4-dev
```

The big difference is that now we print out Client and Server versioning.

```
./bin/podman version --format json
{
    "Client": {
        "RemoteAPIVersion": 1,
        "Version": "1.6.4-dev",
        "GoVersion": "go1.13.4",
        "GitCommit": "a27fa50b7317bae073bcaa15c743e07be47a0e41-dirty",
        "Built": 1575269004,
        "OsArch": "linux/amd64"
    },
    "Server": {
        "RemoteAPIVersion": 1,
        "Version": "1.6.4-dev",
        "GoVersion": "go1.13.4",
        "GitCommit": "a27fa50b7317bae073bcaa15c743e07be47a0e41-dirty",
        "Built": 1575269004,
        "OsArch": "linux/amd64"
    }
}
```
As opposed to:

```
$ podman version --format json
{
    "RemoteAPIVersion": 1,
    "Version": "1.6.4-dev",
    "GoVersion": "go1.13.4",
    "GitCommit": "f5b510d387af311af8b76e043ec58df2e89472fd-dirty",
    "Built": 1574684568,
    "OsArch": "linux/amd64"
}
```
@mheon I enhanced the tests to make sure all of them are valid, also enabled the remote tests.  Do not know why they were disabled before.

Ahh. I see what's going on now.
/lgtm

Would be cool, if this one could be added:
```
❯ podman version --format '{{.Server.APIVersion}}'
Error: template: image:1:9: executing "image" at <.Server.APIVersion>: can't evaluate field APIVersion in type define.Version
```
